reasons: Karrie's repeated Max HP-based true damage can melt Balmond's tanky build.

proof.summary: Balmond often builds HP and defense, while Karrie deals repeated Max HP-based true damage that remains effective into tanky targets.
worksBestWhen: Karrie has attack-speed and on-hit core items.
Karrie can attack safely from the backline.
Balmond is forced to walk forward into Karrie's DPS.
failureCases: Balmond reaches Karrie before she can deal damage.

reasons: Dyrroth can reduce Balmond's Physical Defense and burst him before Balmond gets full sustain value.

proof.summary: Balmond relies on durability and sustain in close fights, while Dyrroth can reduce Physical Defense and burst him before the fight extends.
worksBestWhen: Dyrroth fights Balmond before Balmond becomes too tanky.
Dyrroth has damage or penetration items.
failureCases: Balmond survives the burst and keeps spinning.
Dyrroth stays too low for Balmond's execute.

reasons: Lunox can punish Balmond's tank build with high magic penetration and burst.

proof.summary: Balmond becomes durable through HP and defense, while Lunox can use magic penetration and burst to pressure durable heroes.
worksBestWhen: Lunox has magic penetration or damage items.
Balmond commits forward and cannot escape.
failureCases: Balmond catches Lunox after her escape is used.

reasons: Valir can slow, push, and kite Balmond before Balmond gets extended close-range value.

proof.summary: Balmond needs to stay close and spin through fights, while Valir can slow, push, and kite him away from valuable targets.
worksBestWhen: Valir saves knockback for Balmond's engage.
Balmond is forced to chase through slows.
failureCases: Balmond has speed or engage support.

reasons: X.Borg can poke Balmond from safer range and pressure his durability with true damage.

proof.summary: Balmond wants durable close-range fights, while X.Borg can poke from safer range and add true damage after heating enemies.
worksBestWhen: Balmond is forced to walk through poke.
X.Borg has items and armor state available.
failureCases: X.Borg loses armor form too early.
Balmond has strong follow-up from teammates.
